exercises.name: Barbell Squat
exercises.formTips: Keep chest up, knees tracking over toes, drive through heels, maintain neutral spine
exercises.commonMistakes: Caving knees inward, rounding lower back, heels rising off floor

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.formTips: Hips and shoulders rise together, bar stays close to body, neutral spine throughout
exercises.commonMistakes: Rounding lower back, bar drifting away from body, jerky movements

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.formTips: Feet flat on floor, shoulder blades retracted, lower bar to mid-chest, elbows at 45 degrees
exercises.commonMistakes: Bouncing bar off chest, elbows flaring too wide, feet off floor

exercises.name: Barbell Rows
exercises.formTips: Hinge at hips, chest nearly parallel to floor, pull bar to lower chest, squeeze shoulder blades
exercises.commonMistakes: Rounding back, pulling to waist instead of chest, jerky movements

exercises.name: Dumbbell Chest Press
exercises.formTips: Dumbbells at shoulder height, press straight up, control the descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Dumbbells too high or too low at start, pressing at an angle, elbows flaring excessively

exercises.name: Dumbbell Rows
exercises.formTips: Hinge at hips, one knee on bench, pull dumbbell to ribcage, squeeze at top
exercises.commonMistakes: Rotating torso, pulling too high, not fully extending arm

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.formTips: Feet shoulder-width apart, lower until knees at 90 degrees, push through heels
exercises.commonMistakes: Knees caving inward, going too deep, locking knees at top

exercises.name: Leg Curl Machine
exercises.formTips: Lie face down, curl legs up smoothly, control the descent, keep hips on pad
exercises.commonMistakes: Lifting hips off pad, jerky movements, not controlling descent

exercises.name: Leg Extension Machine
exercises.formTips: Sit upright, extend legs fully, pause at top, control the descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Jerky movements, not extending fully, leaning back too much

exercises.name: Cable Chest Fly
exercises.formTips: Slight bend in elbows, bring hands together in front of chest, squeeze at center
exercises.commonMistakes: Elbows too straight, not bringing hands together, jerky movements

exercises.name: Cable Lat Pulldown
exercises.formTips: Grip slightly wider than shoulders, pull bar to upper chest, squeeze shoulder blades
exercises.commonMistakes: Pulling too low, leaning back excessively, not squeezing at bottom

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.formTips: Sit upright, pull handle to ribcage, squeeze shoulder blades, control return
exercises.commonMistakes: Rounding back, pulling too high, jerky movements

exercises.name: Shoulder Press Machine
exercises.formTips: Sit upright, press handles overhead, control descent, don't lock elbows
exercises.commonMistakes: Leaning back, pressing at an angle, jerky movements

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.formTips: Dumbbells at shoulder height, press straight overhead, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Dumbbells too low at start, pressing at an angle, jerky movements

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.formTips: Slight bend in elbows, raise dumbbells to shoulder height, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Elbows too straight, raising too high, using momentum

exercises.name: Bicep Curls
exercises.formTips: Keep elbows stationary, curl smoothly to shoulder height, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Moving elbows forward, swinging weight, not fully extending

exercises.name: Tricep Dips Machine
exercises.formTips: Sit upright, push handles down, extend arms fully, control return
exercises.commonMistakes: Jerky movements, not extending fully, leaning forward

exercises.name: Tricep Rope Pushdown
exercises.formTips: Elbows at sides, push rope down, fully extend arms, control return
exercises.commonMistakes: Moving elbows away from body, not extending fully, jerky movements

exercises.name: Machine Chest Fly
exercises.formTips: Sit upright, bring handles together smoothly, squeeze at center, control return
exercises.commonMistakes: Jerky movements, not bringing handles together, leaning back

exercises.name: Hack Squat Machine
exercises.formTips: Feet shoulder-width apart, lower until knees at 90 degrees, drive through heels
exercises.commonMistakes: Knees caving inward, going too deep, locking knees at top

exercises.name: Smith Machine Squat
exercises.formTips: Feet slightly forward, lower until knees at 90 degrees, drive through heels
exercises.commonMistakes: Feet too far forward, going too deep, jerky movements

exercises.name: Smith Machine Bench Press
exercises.formTips: Feet flat, lower bar to mid-chest, press straight up, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Bouncing bar, elbows flaring too wide, feet off floor

exercises.name: Smith Machine Rows
exercises.formTips: Hinge at hips, pull bar to lower chest, squeeze shoulder blades, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Rounding back, pulling too high, jerky movements

exercises.name: Cable Bicep Curls
exercises.formTips: Keep elbows stationary, curl smoothly, maintain tension throughout
exercises.commonMistakes: Moving elbows forward, swinging cable, not fully extending

exercises.name: Machine Shoulder Press
exercises.formTips: Sit upright, press handles overhead, control descent, don't lock elbows
exercises.commonMistakes: Leaning back, pressing at angle, jerky movements

exercises.name: Dumbbell Flyes
exercises.formTips: Slight bend in elbows, lower dumbbells in arc motion, squeeze at top
exercises.commonMistakes: Elbows too straight, not controlling descent, jerky movements

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pullovers
exercises.formTips: Lie perpendicular on bench, dumbbell above chest, pull over in arc motion
exercises.commonMistakes: Jerky movements, not controlling descent, elbows too straight

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.formTips: Incline at 45 degrees, press dumbbells up, control descent, elbows at 45 degrees
exercises.commonMistakes: Incline too steep, pressing at angle, elbows flaring too wide

exercises.name: Decline Dumbbell Press
exercises.formTips: Decline at 30 degrees, press dumbbells up, control descent, elbows at 45 degrees
exercises.commonMistakes: Decline too steep, pressing at angle, jerky movements

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shrugs
exercises.formTips: Hold dumbbells at sides, shrug shoulders up, squeeze at top, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Rolling shoulders, jerky movements, not squeezing at top

exercises.name: Barbell Shrugs
exercises.formTips: Hold barbell at hips, shrug shoulders up, squeeze at top, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Rolling shoulders, jerky movements, not squeezing at top

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.formTips: Slight bend in elbows, raise cable to shoulder height, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Elbows too straight, raising too high, using momentum

exercises.name: Machine Leg Press
exercises.formTips: Feet shoulder-width apart, lower until knees at 90 degrees, drive through heels
exercises.commonMistakes: Knees caving inward, going too deep, locking knees at top

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.formTips: Sit upright, curl legs up smoothly, control descent, keep back on pad
exercises.commonMistakes: Lifting back off pad, jerky movements, not controlling descent

exercises.name: Standing Leg Curl
exercises.formTips: Stand upright, curl leg up smoothly, control descent, maintain balance
exercises.commonMistakes: Jerky movements, leaning forward, not controlling descent

exercises.name: Calf Raises Machine
exercises.formTips: Rise up on toes, squeeze at top, control descent, keep knees straight
exercises.commonMistakes: Jerky movements, not squeezing at top, bending knees

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raises
exercises.formTips: Sit upright, rise up on toes, squeeze at top, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Jerky movements, not squeezing at top, not controlling descent

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.formTips: Slight bend in elbows, raise dumbbells to shoulder height, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Elbows too straight, raising too high, using momentum

exercises.name: Dumbbell Reverse Fly
exercises.formTips: Hinge at hips, raise dumbbells out to sides, squeeze shoulder blades
exercises.commonMistakes: Rounding back, raising too high, jerky movements

exercises.name: Cable Reverse Fly
exercises.formTips: Slight bend in elbows, pull cables out to sides, squeeze shoulder blades
exercises.commonMistakes: Elbows too straight, not squeezing at top, jerky movements

exercises.name: Machine Reverse Fly
exercises.formTips: Sit upright, pull handles out to sides, squeeze shoulder blades, control return
exercises.commonMistakes: Jerky movements, not squeezing at top, leaning forward

exercises.name: Barbell Front Squat
exercises.formTips: Bar on shoulders, chest up, knees tracking over toes, drive through heels
exercises.commonMistakes: Elbows dropping, rounding back, heels rising off floor

exercises.name: Barbell Overhead Press
exercises.formTips: Bar at shoulder height, press straight overhead, core engaged, neutral spine
exercises.commonMistakes: Arching back excessively, pressing at angle, jerky movements

exercises.name: Barbell Incline Bench Press
exercises.formTips: Incline at 45 degrees, lower bar to upper chest, press up, elbows at 45 degrees
exercises.commonMistakes: Incline too steep, pressing at angle, elbows flaring too wide

exercises.name: Barbell Decline Bench Press
exercises.formTips: Decline at 30 degrees, lower bar to lower chest, press up, elbows at 45 degrees
exercises.commonMistakes: Decline too steep, pressing at angle, jerky movements

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.formTips: Dumbbells at shoulder height, press straight up, control descent, elbows at 45 degrees
exercises.commonMistakes: Dumbbells too high or low at start, pressing at angle, jerky movements

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Bench Press
exercises.formTips: Incline at 45 degrees, press dumbbells up, control descent, elbows at 45 degrees
exercises.commonMistakes: Incline too steep, pressing at angle, jerky movements

exercises.name: Dumbbell Decline Bench Press
exercises.formTips: Decline at 30 degrees, press dumbbells up, control descent, elbows at 45 degrees
exercises.commonMistakes: Decline too steep, pressing at angle, jerky movements

exercises.name: Barbell Bent-Over Rows
exercises.formTips: Hinge at hips, chest nearly parallel to floor, pull bar to lower chest, squeeze shoulder blades
exercises.commonMistakes: Rounding back, pulling to waist, jerky movements

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bent-Over Rows
exercises.formTips: Hinge at hips, pull dumbbells to ribcage, squeeze shoulder blades, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Rounding back, pulling too high, jerky movements

exercises.name: T-Bar Rows
exercises.formTips: Hinge at hips, pull bar to chest, squeeze shoulder blades, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Rounding back, pulling too high, jerky movements

exercises.name: Seal Rows
exercises.formTips: Lie on incline bench, pull bar to chest, squeeze shoulder blades, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Jerky movements, not squeezing at top, not controlling descent

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Rows
exercises.formTips: Chest on incline, pull bar to chest, squeeze shoulder blades, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Jerky movements, not squeezing at top, not controlling descent

exercises.name: Pendulum Squat
exercises.formTips: Feet shoulder-width apart, lower until knees at 90 degrees, drive through heels
exercises.commonMistakes: Knees caving inward, going too deep, locking knees at top

exercises.name: V-Squat Machine
exercises.formTips: Feet shoulder-width apart, lower until knees at 90 degrees, drive through heels
exercises.commonMistakes: Knees caving inward, going too deep, locking knees at top

exercises.name: Push-ups
exercises.formTips: Hands shoulder-width apart, body in straight line, lower until chest near floor, press back up
exercises.commonMistakes: Hips sagging, elbows flaring too wide, not going deep enough

exercises.name: Wide-Grip Push-ups
exercises.formTips: Hands wider than shoulders, body in straight line, lower until chest near floor
exercises.commonMistakes: Hips sagging, not going deep enough, elbows flaring too much

exercises.name: Diamond Push-ups
exercises.formTips: Hands close together forming diamond, body in straight line, lower until chest near hands
exercises.commonMistakes: Hips sagging, elbows flaring, not going deep enough

exercises.name: Incline Push-ups
exercises.formTips: Hands on elevated surface, body in straight line, lower until chest near surface
exercises.commonMistakes: Hips sagging, elbows flaring too wide, not going deep enough

exercises.name: Decline Push-ups
exercises.formTips: Feet elevated, hands on floor, body in straight line, lower until chest near floor
exercises.commonMistakes: Hips sagging, elbows flaring too wide, not going deep enough

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.formTips: Body in straight line, engage core, don't let hips sag, maintain neutral spine
exercises.commonMistakes: Hips sagging, hips too high, holding breath

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.formTips: Body in straight line, engage core, don't let hips sag, stack feet or stagger them
exercises.commonMistakes: Hips sagging, rotating torso, holding breath

exercises.name: Plank with Shoulder Taps
exercises.formTips: Plank position, tap opposite shoulder, maintain stability, keep hips level
exercises.commonMistakes: Hips rotating, moving too fast, not maintaining plank position

exercises.name: Plank Jacks
exercises.formTips: Plank position, jump feet apart and together, maintain plank form, controlled movement
exercises.commonMistakes: Hips sagging, moving too fast, not maintaining plank position

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
exercises.formTips: Plank position, drive knees toward chest alternately, maintain plank form, controlled pace
exercises.commonMistakes: Hips sagging, moving too fast, not maintaining plank position

exercises.name: Burpees
exercises.formTips: Squat down, hands on floor, jump feet back, push-up, jump feet forward, stand up
exercises.commonMistakes: Not going deep in squat, jerky movements, not fully extending in push-up

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squats
exercises.formTips: Feet shoulder-width apart, lower until thighs parallel to floor, drive through heels
exercises.commonMistakes: Knees caving inward, not going deep enough, heels rising off floor

exercises.name: Jump Squats
exercises.formTips: Squat down, jump up explosively, land softly, immediately squat again
exercises.commonMistakes: Not going deep in squat, jerky landings, not controlling descent

exercises.name: Lunges
exercises.formTips: Step forward, lower back knee toward floor, front knee at 90 degrees, push back to start
exercises.commonMistakes: Front knee going past toes, not going deep enough, jerky movements

exercises.name: Reverse Lunges
exercises.formTips: Step back, lower back knee toward floor, front knee at 90 degrees, push forward to start
exercises.commonMistakes: Front knee going past toes, not going deep enough, jerky movements

exercises.name: Walking Lunges
exercises.formTips: Step forward into lunge, push back to standing, continue walking forward
exercises.commonMistakes: Front knee going past toes, not going deep enough, jerky movements

exercises.name: Jump Lunges
exercises.formTips: Lunge position, jump and switch legs mid-air, land in lunge, continue alternating
exercises.commonMistakes: Not going deep in lunge, jerky landings, not controlling descent

exercises.name: Glute Bridges
exercises.formTips: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat, push hips up, squeeze glutes at top
exercises.commonMistakes: Not squeezing glutes, not going high enough, jerky movements

exercises.name: Single-Leg Glute Bridges
exercises.formTips: Lie on back, one leg up, push hips up with other leg, squeeze glutes at top
exercises.commonMistakes: Not squeezing glutes, not going high enough, hips rotating

exercises.name: Calf Raises
exercises.formTips: Stand upright, rise up on toes, squeeze at top, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Jerky movements, not squeezing at top, not controlling descent

exercises.name: Resistance Band Bicep Curls
exercises.formTips: Stand on band, curl hands up, keep elbows stationary, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Moving elbows forward, swinging band, not fully extending

exercises.name: Resistance Band Tricep Extensions
exercises.formTips: Hold band overhead, extend arms down, keep elbows stationary, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Moving elbows forward, not extending fully, jerky movements

exercises.name: Resistance Band Chest Press
exercises.formTips: Band around back, press forward, control return, maintain tension
exercises.commonMistakes: Not maintaining tension, jerky movements, not fully extending

exercises.name: Resistance Band Rows
exercises.formTips: Band around anchor, pull toward body, squeeze shoulder blades, control return
exercises.commonMistakes: Not squeezing shoulder blades, jerky movements, not fully extending

exercises.name: Resistance Band Lateral Raises
exercises.formTips: Stand on band, raise arms to sides, control descent, maintain tension
exercises.commonMistakes: Jerky movements, raising too high, not maintaining tension

exercises.name: Dumbbell Squats
exercises.formTips: Hold dumbbells, lower into squat, drive through heels, maintain upright torso
exercises.commonMistakes: Knees caving inward, rounding back, not going deep enough

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lunges
exercises.formTips: Hold dumbbells, step forward into lunge, front knee at 90 degrees, push back
exercises.commonMistakes: Front knee going past toes, not going deep enough, jerky movements

exercises.name: Dumbbell Deadlifts
exercises.formTips: Hinge at hips, keep back straight, dumbbells close to body, drive through heels
exercises.commonMistakes: Rounding back, dumbbells drifting away from body, jerky movements

exercises.name: Dumbbell Rows
exercises.formTips: Hinge at hips, pull dumbbells to ribcage, squeeze shoulder blades, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Rounding back, pulling too high, jerky movements

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.formTips: Dumbbells at shoulder height, press overhead, control descent, don't lock elbows
exercises.commonMistakes: Dumbbells too low at start, pressing at angle, jerky movements

exercises.name: Sprints
exercises.formTips: High knee drive, explosive push-off, lean slightly forward, maintain form
exercises.commonMistakes: Overstriding, not driving knees high, poor form at high speed

exercises.name: Long Distance Running
exercises.formTips: Steady pace, upright posture, land mid-foot, maintain consistent breathing
exercises.commonMistakes: Overstriding, heel striking, poor posture, inconsistent pace

exercises.name: Hill Sprints
exercises.formTips: Explosive acceleration uphill, high knee drive, lean into hill, maintain form
exercises.commonMistakes: Overstriding, not driving knees high, poor form, stopping too early

exercises.name: Hill Repeats
exercises.formTips: Sprint up hill, walk down recovery, repeat, maintain consistent effort
exercises.commonMistakes: Not pushing hard enough, not recovering properly, poor form

exercises.name: Park Bench Jumps
exercises.formTips: Jump onto bench explosively, land softly, step down, repeat
exercises.commonMistakes: Not jumping high enough, jerky landings, not controlling descent

exercises.name: Park Bench Step-ups
exercises.formTips: Step up onto bench, drive through front heel, step down, repeat
exercises.commonMistakes: Not going high enough, jerky movements, not controlling descent

exercises.name: Park Bench Dips
exercises.formTips: Hands on bench behind you, lower body by bending elbows, press back up
exercises.commonMistakes: Elbows flaring too wide, not going deep enough, jerky movements

exercises.name: Park Bench Push-ups
exercises.formTips: Hands on bench, body in straight line, lower until chest near bench
exercises.commonMistakes: Hips sagging, elbows flaring too wide, not going deep enough

exercises.name: Pull-ups
exercises.formTips: Grip slightly wider than shoulders, pull body up, chin over bar, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Not going high enough, jerky movements, not controlling descent

exercises.name: Chin-ups
exercises.formTips: Grip shoulder-width, pull body up, chin over bar, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Not going high enough, jerky movements, not controlling descent

exercises.name: Assisted Pull-ups
exercises.formTips: Use assistance band, pull body up, chin over bar, control descent
exercises.commonMistakes: Not going high enough, jerky movements, not controlling descent

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raises
exercises.formTips: Hang from bar, raise legs to horizontal, control descent, maintain grip
exercises.commonMistakes: Swinging body, not raising high enough, jerky movements

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Tucks
exercises.formTips: Hang from bar, raise knees to chest, control descent, maintain grip
exercises.commonMistakes: Swinging body, not raising high enough, jerky movements

exercises.name: Tricep Dips
exercises.formTips: Grip parallel bars, lower body by bending elbows, press back up, lean forward slightly
exercises.commonMistakes: Elbows flaring too wide, not going deep enough, jerky movements

exercises.name: Outdoor Running
exercises.formTips: Steady pace, upright posture, land mid-foot, maintain consistent breathing
exercises.commonMistakes: Overstriding, heel striking, poor posture, inconsistent pace
